title: Agent wrote all deliverables outside the sandboxed workspace; run archive contains no source code
evidence: run_dir has only TASK.md/stack.json/logs (no src/, tests, README, package.json). _agent_stdout.log reports the project was created at /Users/adriancockcroft/dev/book-api/ and the file-mutation verifier flagged a REFUSED write to the temp workspace package.json (/private/var/folders/.../retort-a1f98eae3c2a/package.json — 'Refusing to write to sensitive system path'). scores.json test_coverage=0.75 matches the agent's self-reported 23/31 pass rate, so scoring ran against the escaped copy, not the workspace.
suggestion: Constrain the local agent to write only inside the run workspace; treat out-of-sandbox writes as a hard run failure. This run is non-reproducible from its archive.

title: GET/PUT/DELETE /books/{id} reject the only pre-existing books: id schema requires a UUID but seeded ids are '1','2','3'
evidence: validation.ts:12 bookIdSchema = z.string().uuid(); database.ts:45-49 seeds books with ids '1','2','3'; server.ts:37-40,74-77,100-103 return 400 'Invalid book ID format' for any non-UUID id. So /books/1 -> 400, never 200/404. Works only for POST-created books (createBook uses crypto.randomUUID()). R5/R6 share this defect.
suggestion: Either seed UUID ids or relax bookIdSchema to accept the id format actually used; add a test that fetches a seeded book by id.

title: 8 of 31 tests fail (test_coverage=0.75)
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.75; _agent_stdout.log: '23 tests pass, 8 fail (due to test isolation issues with SQLite database)'. 31 it/test blocks across __tests__/api|validation|database.test.ts, 0 skips.
suggestion: Fix SQLite test isolation (per-test in-memory DB or reset between tests) so the suite passes deterministically.

title: database.ts uses crypto.randomUUID() without importing crypto
evidence: database.ts:115 const id = crypto.randomUUID(); no `import` of node:crypto and no `import 'crypto'`. Relies on the Node >=18 global `crypto`; would ReferenceError on older/other runtimes. The declared `uuid`/`@types/uuid` dependency is unused.
suggestion: Import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto' (or use the declared uuid package) so id generation does not depend on a global.

title: PUT /books/{id} requires a full body (title+author); no partial update
evidence: server.ts:79 validates req.body with bookSchema which requires title and author (validation.ts:4-5). A partial update (e.g. year only) is rejected 400.
suggestion: Accept a partial schema for PUT (or document that PUT is a full replace).

title: ?author= filter is a case-insensitive substring match, not exact
evidence: server.ts:20-22 book.author.toLowerCase().includes(author.toLowerCase()). '?author=Martin' also matches 'Martina'. Loads all rows then filters in JS rather than a WHERE clause.
suggestion: Filter in SQL with a parameterized WHERE author = ? (or LIKE) and decide exact vs. substring semantics.
